name: maquette
description: Image-guided brand kits, component libraries, and implemented website pages

interface.shortDescription: Generate brand kits, components, and pages with image-first QA
interface.longDescription: Create website brand kits, reusable component libraries, and implemented pages through an image_gen-first contract-driven workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $maquette to make a homepage for a fictional sparkling beverage brand called Fizz & Co. Include product highlights, marketing sections, newsletter signup, footer content, and generated image assets where useful.
Use $maquette-brand-kit to create a brand kit for a boutique snack brand with a warm premium grocery feel.
Use $maquette-components to build a reusable component library from the existing approved Maquette brand kit.
Use $maquette-pages to create a pricing page from the existing approved Maquette brand kit and component library. Include plan cards, feature comparison, FAQs, and a clear upgrade path.
Use $maquette-pages to create a product listing page from the existing Maquette artifacts. Include filters, product cards, promo content, and a complete footer.
